# Cipi

> Cipi is the open-source deploy CLI exclusively for Laravel. One command installs a complete production stack (Nginx, PHP, MariaDB, Redis) on any Ubuntu VPS. MIT licensed, self-hosted alternative to Laravel Forge.

Key facts:

- Install: `wget -O - https://cipi.sh/setup.sh | bash`
- Admin access: SSH as `cipi` user, then `sudo -s` to run `cipi` commands
- Stack: Nginx, PHP 8.x, MariaDB, Redis, Supervisor
- Integrations: GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket, webhooks, MCP server for AI agents, deploy notifications (Slack, Discord, Telegram)

## Docs

- [Cipi Documentation](https://cipi.sh/docs/): Full technical documentation — installation, CLI reference, Agent, Git providers, CI/CD, backup, API, security model
- [Cipi Discovery](https://cipi.sh/discovery): Interactive showcase and quick start guide

## API & CLI

- [Installation & Quick Start](https://cipi.sh/docs/getting-started.html#installation): Server requirements, setup script, post-install access
- [Cipi API](https://cipi.sh/docs/advanced.html#cipi-api): REST API for automation and integrations
- [Agent — MCP Server](https://cipi.sh/docs/agent.html#agent-mcp): Model Context Protocol server for AI agents

## Optional

- [Cipi on GitHub](https://github.com/cipi-sh/cipi): Source code, issues, releases
- [Cipi Releases](https://github.com/cipi-sh/cipi/releases): Changelog and version history
